case_title: CORNELL JAMES VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CORNELL JAMES APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,978.98 FILED BY JAMES, CORNELL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, CORNELL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, CORNELL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-09-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
